gujarati_literature.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(guj) AND NOT subject:(newspaper) AND NOT subject:(magazine)

gujarati_news.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(guj) AND (subject:(newspaper) OR subject:(magazine) OR subject:(bulletin) OR subject:(journal) OR subject:(periodical) OR title:(samachar) OR title:(patrika) OR title:(akhbar) OR title:(weekly) OR title:(daily))

gujarati_science_archive.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(guj) AND (subject:(chemistry) OR subject:(physics) OR subject:(mathematics) OR title:(chemistry) OR title:(physics) OR title:(mathematics))

gujarati_law.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(guj) AND (subject:(law) OR subject:(legislation) OR subject:(act) OR subject:(regulation) OR subject:(ordinance) OR subject:(rules) OR subject:(code) OR subject:(bill) OR title:(act) OR title:(law) OR title:(regulation) OR title:(rules) OR subject:(constitution))

gujarati_official.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(guj) AND (subject:(government) OR subject:(gazette) OR subject:(official) OR title:(gazette) OR subject:(administration report))

gujarati_dictionary.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(guj) AND (subject:(dictionary) OR subject:(dictionaries) OR title:(dictionary) OR title:(kosh) OR subject:(lexicon) OR subject:(glossary) OR title:(glossary) OR subject:(vocabulary) OR title:(shabdakosh))

russian_science.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(rus) AND (subject:(science) OR subject:(physics) OR subject:(chemistry) OR subject:(biology) OR subject:(mathematics)) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]

russian_literature_modern.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(rus) AND subject:(fiction) AND year:[1950 TO 2026]

russian_literature_classic.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(rus) AND (subject:(fiction) OR subject:(literature) OR subject:(poetry) OR subject:(novel)) AND year:[1000 TO 1949]

russian_news.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(rus) AND (subject:(newspaper) OR subject:(periodical) OR subject:(magazine)) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]

russian_law.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(rus) AND (subject:(law) OR subject:(legislation)) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]

russian_social_science.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(rus) AND (subject:(sociology) OR subject:(economics) OR subject:("political science") OR subject:("social science")) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]

english_science.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(eng) AND (subject:(science) OR subject:(physics) OR subject:(chemistry) OR subject:(biology) OR subject:(mathematics)) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]

english_literature_modern.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(eng) AND subject:(fiction) AND year:[1950 TO 2026]

english_literature_classic.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(eng) AND subject:(fiction) AND year:[1000 TO 1949]

english_news.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(eng) AND (subject:(newspaper) OR subject:(periodical) OR subject:(magazine)) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]

english_law.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(eng) AND (subject:(law) OR subject:(legislation)) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]

english_social_science.query: mediatype:(texts) AND language:(eng) AND (subject:(sociology) OR subject:(economics) OR subject:("political science") OR subject:("social science")) AND year:[1000 TO 1929]
